overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a fantasy action RPG showing an armored character exploring a misty cave system. The character walks through shallow water toward a massive waterfall and passes through the cascading water into a hidden area behind it.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow cave pool beneath rock overhang

agents.ego_description: armored character walking steadily through shallow water toward the distant waterfall

entered.detail: large rocky ledge extending overhead creating partial cover
tall gray stone wall of the cavern
tall gray stone wall with rocky outcrops
massive cascading waterfall creating mist at the end of the cavern
clusters of yellow lily pads and aquatic vegetation floating in the water
rocky bank with tall grass along the water's edge

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a shallow cave pool beneath a massive rock overhang. Yellow aquatic plants float in the water as the character approaches a distant waterfall at the end of the cavern. Mist from the falls creates a hazy atmosphere in the cool blue-green environment.

events.description: character enters the waterfall curtain, view becomes dominated by cascading water

agents.ego_description: character walking into the waterfall, becoming partially obscured by the rushing water

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and enters the massive waterfall. The view transitions from the open cavern to being enveloped by the water curtain. The yellow aquatic plants disappear from view as the character moves deeper into the cascade, with the cave walls receding into the background.

events.description: character completely obscured by falling water, view fills with turbulent cascade

agents.ego_description: character has passed through the waterfall curtain and is no longer visible, obscured by the cascading water as they continue into the cavern beyond

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through the waterfall, which now fills the entire screen with turbulent blue-white water. The character is completely obscured by the cascade. Only the top edge of the rock overhang remains visible as the camera continues ascending through the water curtain into the hidden area beyond.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a misty cavern pool through the heart of a massive waterfall into a hidden space beyond. It begins with the character wading through shallow, blue-green waters dotted with floating yellow aquatic plants, moving steadily toward a distant cascade beneath a heavy rock overhang. As the character approaches the falls, the open cavern atmosphere shifts, and the view is gradually enveloped by the descending curtain of water. The scene then transitions into a blur of turbulent blue-white water that completely obscures the character and the surrounding environment. Finally, the camera ascends through the rushing cascade, leaving the rock overhang behind as it breaks through the water curtain into the secret area beyond.
